description_long: This handbag features a rectangular, envelope-style silhouette with a structured form and a flat base. The exterior is adorned with a bold plaid pattern in alternating bands of blue, maroon, black, and beige, creating a visually striking appearance. The front and back panels are identical, with a subtle V-shaped seam suggesting a flap closure. The sides are narrow and taper towards the top, giving the bag a sleek, streamlined profile. The material appears to be a woven textile, likely cotton or a cotton blend, with a soft matte finish. No visible hardware, logos, or decorative elements are present, emphasizing the clean, classic design.
description: Rectangular envelope-style handbag with a bold plaid pattern in blue, maroon, black, and beige. Features a structured form, V-shaped seam, and a soft matte textile exterior.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full plaid pattern, V-shaped seam, and the structured rectangular shape.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the narrow, tapered profile and the continuation of the plaid pattern along the edge.
description_view_2: Back view is identical to the front, displaying the same plaid pattern and V-shaped seam.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the slim, tapered edge and plaid design.
attribute_strap_type: none visible; likely a clutch or envelope style with no external straps or handles
attribute_closure_mechanism: flap closure, suggested by the V-shaped seam on the front panel
attribute_pattern: plaid pattern with horizontal and vertical bands in blue, maroon, black, and beige
